iban.description: The IBAN of the monetary account.

display_name.description: The name to display with this monetary account.

avatar.description: The avatar of the monetary account.

label_user.description: The user this monetary account belongs to.

country.description: The country of the user. Formatted as a ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

bunq_me.description: Bunq.me pointer with type and value.

is_light.description: Whether or not the monetary account is light.

swift_bic.description: The BIC used for a SWIFT payment.

swift_account_number.description: The account number used for a SWIFT payment. May or may not be an IBAN.

transferwise_account_number.description: The account number used for a Transferwise payment. May or may not be an IBAN.

transferwise_bank_code.description: The bank code used for a Transferwise payment. May or may not be a BIC.
